Steps to Build RAG Pipeline with Cohere For AI’s Aya LLM | E2E Networks Blog | E2E Networks
Guide to Build an LLM Application for Law - Using SaulLM-7B and RAG Pipeline | E2E Networks Blog | E2E Networks

E2E-AT: A Unified Framework for Tackling Uncertainty in Task-aware End-to-end Learning
Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors

content.text:
Here are several authoritative and recent sources on end-to-end (E2E) pipelines across various domains:

1. **Implementing a RAG Pipeline with Mixtral 8x7B**  
   This article discusses the implementation of a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using the Mixtral 8x7B model, highlighting its Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (SMoE) architecture and performance benchmarks. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/implementing-a-rag-pipeline-with-mixtral-8x7b?utm_source=openai))

2. **Steps to Build RAG Pipeline with Cohere For AI’s Aya LLM**  
   This guide provides a step-by-step process for deploying and using the Aya 101 model by Cohere for AI, including building a FAISS-powered RAG pipeline for AI applications. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/steps-to-build-rag-pipeline-with-cohere-for-ais-aya-llm?utm_source=openai))

3. **Guide to Build an LLM Application for Law - Using SaulLM-7B and RAG Pipeline**  
   This article outlines the development of a legal domain-specific large language model, SaulLM-7B, and demonstrates how to build a streaming law chatbot using this model and a RAG pipeline. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/guide-to-build-an-llm-application-for-law---using-saullm-7b-and-rag-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

4. **Multi-Model Inference with Triton Inference Server**  
   This post explores the deployment of a multi-model deep learning architecture using the Triton Inference Server, discussing its features and benefits for real-time inference. ([e2enetworks.com](https://www.e2enetworks.com/blog/multi-model-inference-with-triton-inference-server?utm_source=openai))

5. **Build E2E CI/CD Pipeline using GitHub Actions, Docker & Cloud**  
   This tutorial guides readers through implementing an end-to-end Continuous Integration/Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipeline for machine learning projects using GitHub Actions, Docker, and cloud services. ([towardsai.net](https://towardsai.net/p/l/build-e2e-ci-cd-pipeline-using-github-actions-docker-cloud?utm_source=openai))

6. **Feature-Driven End-To-End Test Generation**  
   This research paper presents AutoE2E, a novel approach that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the generation of semantically meaningful feature-driven end-to-end test cases for web applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.01894?utm_source=openai))

7. **E2E-AT: A Unified Framework for Tackling Uncertainty in Task-aware End-to-end Learning**  
   This paper introduces E2E-AT, a framework that addresses uncertainties in end-to-end learning by combining prediction and optimization models, with applications in power system operation problems. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.10587?utm_source=openai))

8. **Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors**  
   This study discusses optimization strategies for end-to-end AI pipelines on Intel Xeon processors, achieving performance improvements across various AI applications. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.00286?utm_source=openai))

These sources provide comprehensive insights into the design, implementation, and optimization of end-to-end pipelines in different contexts.
